questions.question: What is the primary function of a 2:1 multiplexer?
options: To select one of three inputs
To select one of two inputs
To select one of four inputs
To select one of six inputs
questions.explanation: A 2:1 multiplexer selects one of three inputs based on a select signal.

questions.question: How many inputs does a 4:1 multiplexer have?
What is the primary function of an n:1 multiplexer?
options: To select one of n inputs
To select one of n outputs
To select one of n states
To select one of n addresses
questions.explanation: An n:1 multiplexer selects one of n outputs based on a select signal.

questions.question: How many select lines does a 2:1 multiplexer have?
questions.explanation: A 2:1 multiplexer has one select line.

questions.question: What type of multiplexer is used when all inputs are active?
questions.explanation: An active-high multiplexer is used when all inputs are active.
